name: TellTale: Blending Multi-Instance LoRA Text Encoders and a Zero-Shot LLM Judge for Ambivalence/Hesitancy Recognition in Videos

description: arXiv:2607.16635v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We present TellTale, a text-only approach to ambivalence/hesitancy (A/H) recognition in interview videos, evaluated on the BAH dataset as part of the 3rd A/H Video Recognition Challenge (11th ABAW Workshop, ECCV 2026). Although the dataset provides video, audio, facial crops, and transcripts, TellTale relies on the transcript alone and combines...
author: Abdel-Karim Al-Tamimi, Ali Rodan
